notes: I've tried GE-Proton7-41, Experimental, Proton8.0-4 & Proton7.0-6... 7.0-6 is the one that allows it to load, play sound & intro scenes and gets me to the instant where we gain control of the character, then a window pops up and seems to be trying to load or refresh, but it has an ! on the window then it promptly crashes to desktop. I've not been able to get past this point to actually play the game at all. It's really too bad because the sound, cutscene and graphics sound & look great.
